######
#@   #

turns.parsed_response: <think>The box is below me, target is below-right. I should move down to approach.</think><answer>Down</answer>

messages.content: You are a Sokoban-solving agent. Respond with one action.

######

#@$  #

######

turns.parsed_response: <think>Now I can push the box right toward the target column.</think><answer>Right</answer>
